minimal.description: 4 generic cores: business, product, technical, operational
minimal.use_when: You need the generic four-core scaffold.

saas.description: minimal + SaaS subcores: revenue, paywall, billing, onboarding
saas.use_when: The project has revenue, paywall, billing, and onboarding decisions.

agent-tool.description: for AI agents, developer tools, plugins, and automation products
agent-tool.use_when: The project is an AI agent, developer tool, plugin, connector, or automation product.

oss-library.description: for open-source libraries, SDKs, packages, and reusable developer APIs
oss-library.use_when: The project is a public library, SDK, package, or reusable developer API.
